programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: For twenty years, Moiraine has dreamed and worked towards this moment. But she can't stop the Dragon Reborn from seeing the appeal of the Dark.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things - Moiraine's true goal, Lan's past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: For twenty years, Moiraine has dreamed and worked towards this moment. But she can't stop the Dragon Reborn from seeing the appeal of the Dark.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a Navy Lieutenant's death reveals ties to Special Agent Sawyer (Zane Holtz), Torres and Knight uncover a murder linked to a wealthy family. Meanwhile, Parker discovers a shocking connection between his mother's death and Lily.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A girls' night out takes an unexpected turn when NCIS is called to investigate the motive of a possible arsonist. Also, Torres struggles to find work/life balance.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS captures the hitman known as 'The Poet,' the team races to uncover who ordered the assassination of a Navy Chief.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: Phantom Racer
programme.desc: 17 years ago, Sawyer caused the death of McCullough. When Sawyer becomes the prime suspect in a series of murders, he realizes his ex-girlfriend and her daughter are also in danger.

programme.title: DOC - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Giulia must make a decision about her personal life that will also affect her career; Martina gives the most challenging exam of her life; Ric is forced to come to terms with Alba's ghost; Lin and Federico resume working on the database.

programme.title: DOC - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Agnese's illness forces Andrea to accept her condition; the new head physician handles a case that will require someone to make a tragic compromise; Lorenzo is entrusted with a patient who has arrived from a nursing home.

programme.title: DOC - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Giulia must make a decision about her personal life that will also affect her career; Martina gives the most challenging exam of her life; Ric is forced to come to terms with Alba's ghost; Lin and Federico resume working on the database.

programme.title: DOC - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Agnese's illness forces Andrea to accept her condition; the new head physician handles a case that will require someone to make a tragic compromise; Lorenzo is entrusted with a patient who has arrived from a nursing home.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard
programme.desc: When a successful Phoenix realtor disappears in the desert, investigators discover that a killer is targeting real estate agents and must catch him before he strikes again.

programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.desc: Giulia must make a decision about her personal life that will also affect her career; Martina gives the most challenging exam of her life; Ric is forced to come to terms with Alba's ghost; Lin and Federico resume working on the database.

programme.desc: Agnese's illness forces Andrea to accept her condition; the new head physician handles a case that will require someone to make a tragic compromise; Lorenzo is entrusted with a patient who has arrived from a nursing home.

programme.title: DOC - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Giulia must make a decision about her personal life that will also affect her career; Martina gives the most challenging exam of her life; Ric is forced to come to terms with Alba's ghost; Lin and Federico resume working on the database.

programme.title: DOC - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Agnese's illness forces Andrea to accept her condition; the new head physician handles a case that will require someone to make a tragic compromise; Lorenzo is entrusted with a patient who has arrived from a nursing home.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard
programme.desc: When a successful Phoenix realtor disappears in the desert, investigators discover that a killer is targeting real estate agents and must catch him before he strikes again.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS captures the hitman known as 'The Poet,' the team races to uncover who ordered the assassination of a Navy Chief.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee's career and credibility are on the line when he investigates the deputy director for corruption. Also, Torres and Knight receive some surprising news.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As NCIS investigates a dangerous connection between the Nexus cartel and Parker's longtime nemesis, mob boss Carla Marino, the team uncovers a high-stakes plot involving stolen nuclear material. With time running out, Parker is forced into an uneasy alliance that could determine the fate of the operation - and his own future.

programme.title: Nanny's Killer Scandal
programme.desc: Jamie Kassman takes on a temporary job as a nanny for her idol, multimillionnaire Walter Page. Things start off great but when his advances get rejected, his intentions quickly go from inappropriate to deadly.

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: The 10 remaining contestants step into the kitchen with the goal of elevating the traditional pizza into a next-level masterpiece; the winning pizza gains immunity for the whole team and claims the top-level kitchen spot.

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: Using a bounty of fresh ingredients from the platform, the chef who prepares the best Greek entree wins immunity for their team.

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: The 10 remaining contestants step into the kitchen with the goal of elevating the traditional pizza into a next-level masterpiece; the winning pizza gains immunity for the whole team and claims the top-level kitchen spot.

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: Using a bounty of fresh ingredients from the platform, the chef who prepares the best Greek entree wins immunity for their team.
